symbols.name: Log(Result, ILogger, string, params object[])
symbols.summary: Logs a Result using structured logging with default levels (Debug on success, Warning on failure).
symbols.remarks: - This method never alters the business outcome or throws. - It emits consistent fields: LogKey, ValueType, Messages (count), Errors (count), and for failures, ErrorTypes (array of error type names).

syntax.content: public static Result Log(this Result result, ILogger logger, string messageTemplate = null, params object[] args)

parameters.description: The result instance to log.
The logger to write to. If null, the method is a no-op and returns the original result.
Optional message template for structured logging (e.g., "Finished handler for {Email}").
Optional structured logging arguments corresponding to messageTemplate.

returns.description: The original result instance, unchanged.

parameters.description: The result instance to log.
The logger to write to. If null, the method is a no-op and returns the original result.

Optional structured logging arguments corresponding to messageTemplate.

returns.description: The original result instance, unchanged.

The log level used when the result indicates failure.
Optional structured logging arguments corresponding to messageTemplate.

symbols.name: StartOperation(Result, Func>)
symbols.summary: Starts a scoped operation (e.g., database transaction) around a Result chain. The operation is lazily started on the first async operation in the chain.

syntax.content: public static ResultOperationScope StartOperation(this Result result, Func> operation) where TOperation : class, IOperationScope

parameters.description: The result to wrap in an operation scope.
Function to start the operation (e.g., BeginTransactionAsync).

returns.description: A ResultOperationScope that allows chaining operations and ending with EndOperationAsync.

parameters.description: The result to wrap in an operation scope.
Function to start the operation (e.g., BeginTransactionAsync).

returns.description: A ResultOperationScope that allows chaining operations and ending with EndOperationAsync.

symbols.name: StartOperation(Result, TOperation)
symbols.summary: Starts a scoped operation with a synchronously created operation object.

syntax.content: public static ResultOperationScope StartOperation(this Result result, TOperation operation) where TOperation : class, IOperationScope

parameters.description: The result to wrap in an operation scope.
The operation instance (e.g., a transaction that was already started).

returns.description: A ResultOperationScope that allows chaining operations and ending with EndOperationAsync.

The operation instance (e.g., a transaction that was already started).

symbols.name: Flatten(IEnumerable>, ProcessingOptions)
symbols.summary: Flattens a collection of Results into a single Result, combining all errors and messages. Returns success with the last successful value only if ALL results succeed. Returns failure with the first failed value if ANY result fails.

syntax.content: public static Result Flatten(this IEnumerable> results, ProcessingOptions options = null)

parameters.description: The collection of Results to flatten.
Options for handling failure scenarios.

returns.description: A single Result with accumulated errors/messages, successful only if all results succeed.

parameters.description: The collection of Results to flatten.
Options for handling failure scenarios.

returns.description: A single Result with accumulated errors/messages, successful only if all results succeed.
